ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "satisfaction" REAL /* Employee satisfaction score (0-1) */,
  "last_evaluation" REAL /* Last performance evaluation score (0-1) */,
  "monthly_hours" INTEGER /* Average monthly working hours */,
  "time_with_company" INTEGER /* Time spent with the company in years */,
  "left" INTEGER /* Indicator if the employee has left (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "promotion" INTEGER /* Indicator if the employee was promoted in the last 5 years (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the salary level of the employee */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Hire date of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the employee */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, country) of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_salary_id FOREIGN KEY ("salary_id") REFERENCES salary_levels ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, country) of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  "turnover_rate" REAL /* Turnover rate of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_levels" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary level */,
  "salary_level" TEXT /* Name of the salary level */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Range of the salary level */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary for the salary level */,
  "minimum_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary for the salary level */,
  "maximum_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary for the salary level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_projects" (
  "employee_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee-project relationship */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee involved in the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee in the project */,
  "hours_contributed" INTEGER /* Total hours contributed by the employee to the project */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee completed their role in the project */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the employee in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_projects_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retention_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retention metric */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "retention_score" REAL /* Retention score (0-1) indicating the likelihood of the employee staying */,
  "turnover_risk" REAL /* Turnover risk (0-1) indicating the likelihood of the employee leaving */,
  "last_promotion_date" TEXT /* Date of the last promotion */,
  "last_raise_date" TEXT /* Date of the last raise */,
  "training_hours" INTEGER /* Number of training hours completed by the employee */,
  "feedback_score" REAL /* Average feedback score from colleagues and managers */,
  "engagement_level" REAL /* Engagement level of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retention_metrics_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
